summary: The video segment captures a subway train at a station platform. Initially, the train is stationary with its doors closed. Shortly after, the train begins to move and departs from the platform, traveling along the tracks and eventually disappearing into the tunnel. The platform is equipped with safety barriers, and a few passengers are seen waiting at a safe distance from the edge.

summary: The video captures a dramatic incident at a Buenos Aires subway station. A woman standing near the edge of the platform suddenly collapses and falls onto the tracks as a train approaches. Several bystanders immediately react, rushing to help her. As the train arrives, people frantically signal and attempt to pull her to safety. The video then transitions to an ITV News outro screen.
unsafeBehaviorsText: A woman collapses and falls onto the train tracks as a train is approaching, creating an extremely dangerous situation. at 00:00:04.600
objectDataText: Handbag: A handbag is visible near the woman who falls, possibly belonging to her.
